lastSummary: Reviewed the prior hour and found no new project work beyond the 10:49 AM EDT auto-sync commit `a42c0c3`; Git HEAD stayed there through this pass.

Captured passive continuity work instead: the browser/LAN troubleshooting transcript was written to `memory/2026-04-11-browser-https.md`, the managed worker wake refreshed its own state file, and the workspace remained otherwise quiet.
Re-reviewed both long-lived Discord branch state files against the importance rubric, found no pending shared-important promotions, and stamped fresh review metadata before running git auto-sync.
